zh.lifeSummary: 當John Belgrave於1535年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Richard Belgrave27歲，母親Elizabeth Huddlestone22歲。他於1560年9月22日與Joanna Strutt在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年2月12日在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Belgrave于1535年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Richard Belgrave27岁，母亲Elizabeth Huddlestone22岁。他于1560年9月22日与Joanna Strutt在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年2月12日在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Belgrave was born in 1535, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Belgrave, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Huddlestone, was 22. He married Joanna Strutt on 22 September 1560, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 12 February 1591, in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Belgrave est né en 1535, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Belgrave, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Huddlestone, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Strutt le 22 septembre 1560, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 12 février 1591, à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.St Martin, Suffolk, England: St Martin by Looe, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Belgrave 1535 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Belgrave 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Huddlestone 22. Er hat am 22. September 1560 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Joanna Strutt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Februar 1591 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave è nato il nel 1535 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Belgrave, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Huddlestone, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Strutt il 22 settembre 1560, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1591, nel Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Belgraveが1535年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Richard Belgraveは27歳，母Elizabeth Huddlestoneは22歳であった。1560年9月22日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJoanna Struttと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年2月12日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Martin, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마틴 비 루
ko.lifeSummary: John Belgrave(이)가 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Belgrave(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Huddlestone(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1560년 9월 22일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Joanna Strutt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 2월 12일 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.St Martin, Suffolk, England: St Martin by Looe, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave nasceu em 1535, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Belgrave, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Huddlestone, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Strutt em 22 de setembro de 1560, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1591, em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ro.St Martin, Suffolk, England: St Martin by Looe, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.St Martin, Suffolk, England: ст мартинь би лу, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Belgrave родился в 1535 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Belgrave было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Huddlestone, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Strutt 22 сентября 1560 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 12 февраля 1591 г. в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.St Martin, Suffolk, England: St Martin by Looe, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Belgrave nació en 1535, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Belgrave, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Huddlestone, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joanna Strutt el 22 de septiembre de 1560, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1591, en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
